body.title: agent_datacenter: web server device — read-only IMAP subscriber, tab-per-mailbox
body.result: Web server device deferred to Phase 5 (no blocker for Igor relaunch)
body.description:
The web server is a read-only device that subscribes to all IMAP mailboxes via IDLE and renders them as live tabs. Design invariant: 'just a device that draws' — all data comes from the bus.

Proposed shape:
- agent_datacenter/devices/web_server/device.py:
  class WebServerDevice(BaseDevice):
    comms() → {'read_only': True, 'push': False, 'pull': True, 'nudge': False}
    health() → {'http_server_up': bool, 'imap_connected': bool, 'subscribed_mailboxes': count}
    On registration: subscribe to all current IMAP mailboxes via IMAP IDLE
    On new mailbox created: skeleton notifies web server → web server subscribes to new mailbox
    Each mailbox = one browser tab, live-updating via IMAP IDLE push
    HTTP server: FastAPI or Flask, single-page app, tab per mailbox
    24hr log view: render message history from IMAP store (no separate log pipeline)
    Design invariant enforced: web server has NO direct access to device state — all info from bus

Affected files:
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/devices/web_server/device.py
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/devices/web_server/shim.py
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/devices/web_server/app.py (HTTP server, tab renderer)

Design rules:
- oop-first: WebServerDevice, WebServerShim classes
- docs-in-code: 'just a device that draws' invariant stated in class docstring

Scope boundary:
IN: web server device registration, IMAP IDLE subscription for all mailboxes, tab-per-mailbox HTTP UI, 24hr history from IMAP
OUT: any privileged device state access — web server sees only what's on the bus

Test plan:
- WebServerDevice registers → rack.devices() includes 'web-server'
- Open browser: each registered device's mailbox appears as a tab
- Send message to Shared → Shared tab updates within 2s (IDLE push)
- 24hr history rendered from IMAP store (no separate log query)
